System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference Coslad_MBL_X95_0400.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 125000
Send ID 751
Receive ID 771
Functional Addr 07
Functional Name Lampes à décharge
